programme.title: Titoo Bana Secretary-Titoo
programme.desc: Things take an unexpected turn when Titoo is asked to become the building secretary. S06E10.

programme.title: Swachh School Abhiyaan-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito and Shera learn that a rival principal is trying to ruin their school's impression. S06E11.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Yoga Class-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo helps a yoga teacher who lost his land after being deceived by his student. S07E18.

programme.title: Samunder Ke Lootere Sheher Me-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S07 E19.

programme.title: A Running Battle-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr. Bean constantly finds himself locked in a series of skirmishes with a man. S01E51.

programme.title: Egg and Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean unknowingly hatches into a bird's egg and helps it learn to fly. S01E52.

programme.title: Hopping Mad-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean becomes fascinated by the frogs in the park and takes some babies home. S01E47.

programme.title: A Grand Invitation-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean rescues an old woman's dog and is promptly invited for lunch at a large mansion. S01E48.

programme.title: A Royal Makeover-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean redecorates his room to look like Buckingham Palace which attracts tourists. S01E49.

programme.title: Supermarrow-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean grows a watermelon for a competition and gets creative with his gardening methods.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E95.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E96.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E97.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E98.

programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E99.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E100.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E101.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E102.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E103.

programme.title: Baatuni Aunty Ki Batein-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S07 E20.

programme.title: Bus Hijack-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo uses a smartwatch to save his classmates after two robbers hijack their school bus. S07E21.

programme.title: Titoo Ka Cctv-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo sees camera footage of his neighbour getting kidnapped. S07E22.

programme.title: Titoo Bana Tower-Titoo
programme.desc: When Titoo gets accidentally hit by the light of a magical torch, he grows very tall. S07 E02.

programme.title: Ganna Ka Gift-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's kindness to an elderly woman backfires, leaving him giftless for Ganna's birthday. S02 E01.

programme.title: Secretary Memory Loss-Titoo
programme.desc: When the building secretary plays a game of cricket with Titoo, he suffers an accident. S02 E02.

programme.title: Papa Ka Laptop-Titoo
programme.desc: After breaking their father's laptop, Golu and Titoo scramble to mend it. S02 E03.

programme.title: Titoo Vs Shark-Titoo
programme.desc: At the aquarium waterpark, a jealous Shera isolates Titoo with rumours. S02 E04.

programme.title: Papa Aur Secretary Ka Jhagda-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and his friends attempt to talk sense into the feuding elders and restore peace. S02 E05.

programme.title: Titoo Chori Ho Gaya-Titoo
programme.desc: Thieves steal Titoo's family car when he is fast asleep in it. S02 E06.

programme.title: Papa Ki Neend-Titoo
programme.desc: After Titoo's father falls ill from inhaling fumes, Titoo and Golu must work in his place. S02 E07.

programme.title: Parents Competition-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera and Titoo's friendly bet turns chaotic during a parents' sports day. S02 E08.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: Tasvir Singh, a noted photographer, arrives at school for the class photo. S01 E51.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: The boys believe that they will ace the exams based on Choocha's dream. S01 E52.

programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice. S01E76.
